# Project blueprint

_Generated 2026-05-13 by /mol:map._

## Inventory

### C library

| src/ | public surface | layer | notes |
|------|---------------|-------|-------|
| `rs.c` | `molqrc_gf_init`, `molqrc_gf_mul`, `molqrc_rs_encode`, `molqrc_rs_compute_divisor`, `molqrc_rs_compute_remainder` | math ‚Äî GF(256) + Reed-Solomon | lookup-table GF mul, generator-polynomial division |
| `qrc.c` | `molqrc_capacity`, `molqrc_ec_codewords_per_block`, `molqrc_block_info`, `molqrc_remainder_bits`, `molqrc_alignment_positions`, `molqrc_raw_data_modules`, `molqrc_cci_bits`, `molqrc_bitbuf_init`, `molqrc_bitbuf_append`, `molqrc_encode_segments_to_codewords`, `molqrc_interleave` | spec ‚Äî ISO 18004 capacity tables, CCI, encoding pipeline | static const tables, MSB-first bit buffer, segment‚Üícodewords‚Üíinterleave |
| `matrix.c` | `molqrc_build_matrix` | matrix ‚Äî finder/alignment/timing patterns, data placement, mask evaluation (8 patterns, 4 penalty rules) | in-place matrix ops, auto-mask selects best penalty |
| `segment.c` | `molqrc_is_numeric`, `molqrc_is_alphanumeric`, `molqrc_calc_segment_bit_length`, `molqrc_make_bytes`, `molqrc_make_numeric`, `molqrc_make_alphanumeric`, `molqrc_make_eci` | data ‚Äî segment constructors + validators | accumulator pattern: numeric 3‚Üí10 bits, alphanum 2‚Üí11 bits, ECI variable-length header |
| `molqrc.c` | `molqrc_encode_text`, `molqrc_encode_segments`, `molqrc_draw_text`, `molqrc_draw_matrix` | orchestration ‚Äî version selection, ECL boost, pipeline glue | version scan‚Üíencode‚ÜíRS‚Üíinterleave‚Üímatrix; draw via caller callback |

### Python package

| molqrc/ | public surface | layer | notes |
|----------|---------------|-------|-------|
| `__init__.py` | `QRCode`, `encode_segments`, `make_segment_*`, `is_numeric`, `is_alphanumeric`, constants (`ECL_L/M/Q/H`, `MODE_*`, `MASK_AUTO`) | ctypes bindings ‚Äî C‚ÜíPython | `QRCode(side, matrix, version, text)` immutable view; segment API thin pass-through |
| `cli.py` | `main()` ‚Üí `molqrc preview/pic/web` | CLI ‚Äî argparse subcommands | thin orchestration: parse‚Üíconstruct QRCode‚Üícall output |
| `export.py` | `to_svg(matrix, side, path, scale, dark, light)` | SVG export ‚Äî zero-dependency | direct XML string, quiet zone + viewBox |
| `_png.py` | `write(matrix, side, path, scale)` | PNG export ‚Äî Pillow required | PIL Image.frombytes‚Üíresize‚Üísave |
| `preview.py` | `to_text(matrix, side, border)` | terminal preview ‚Äî best-effort | double-char blocks "##"/"  ", not scannable |
| `web.py` | `generate(matrix, side, dir_path, title, text)` | web ‚Äî single-file interactive HTML | inline CSS + pure-JS QR encoder, zero external deps, Cloudflare Pages deployable |

### Layer diagram

```
C:   rs ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚Üí qrc ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚Üí matrix ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚Üí molqrc
               ‚Üò segment ‚Üó

Python:  __init__ (ctypes) ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚Üí QRCode
         cli ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚Üí QRCode ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚Üí export / _png / preview / web
```

### Invariants

- Zero external C dependencies
- `include/molqrc.h` is the only public C surface
- Matrix format: `0` = white, `1` = black, row-major
- QR Version 1‚Äì40, all 4 ECL levels (L/M/Q/H)
